name: videos
description: Opinionated video preproduction workflows for storyboard frames, product-launch motion direction, and AI-video-ready shot batches.

interface.shortDescription: Storyboard and product-launch motion preproduction workflows.
interface.longDescription: Opinionated preproduction workflows for product-launch and SaaS motion graphics: narrative shaping, visual style contracts, storyboard generation with Codex imagegen, frame QA, upload batching, and AI-video motion handoff prompts.
defaultPrompt: Create storyboard frames for this SaaS product launch.
Turn these screenshots into a cohesive motion-design storyboard.
Make AI-video-ready storyboard batches from these frames.
Write a Higgsfield Canvas motion handoff prompt for these storyboard frames.
